particulars.description: The leasehold property known as the second and third floor basements and other land being the second and third floor basements and other land being part of 39 to 42 grosvenor square and 39 to 42 adams's row as is more particularly described in a lease dated 7 october 1974 made between (1) jermyn investment co. Limited and (2) national car parks limited.. Title number: NGL254193.
